---
title: Yet Another Data Science Job Market Analysis
author: ~
date: '2019-09-14'
slug: yadsjma
categories: ['Analysis']
tags: ['R', 'LinkedIn', 'scraping', 'jobs', 'data science']
description: 'An analysis of the data science job market from scraped LinkedIn data'
disableComments: no
---

<script> 
  window.location.replace("https://tylerburleigh.com/YADSJMA");
</script>

## Go here: [https://tylerburleigh.com/YADSJMA](https://tylerburleigh.com/YADSJMA)
